What we do

Complete roofing services, done properly

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof, we cover every part of your roof with the same care and attention to detail.

New Roofs

Full tile, slate and flat roof installations, built to last and fully guaranteed.

Roof Repairs

Leaks, slipped tiles and storm damage put right quickly and cleanly.

Chimneys and Leadwork

Repointing, rebuilds and watertight lead flashing that lasts for years.

Fascias, Soffits and Guttering

UPVC fascias, soffits and seamless guttering fitted to a clean finish.

Roof Cleaning and Moss Removal

Pressure washing and moss removal to bring your roof back to life.

Ridge Tiling and Pointing

Re-bedded and re-pointed ridges for a secure, weatherproof finish.

The difference

Before and after

Watch one of our recent roofs go from worn and weathered to watertight and finished.

Project · Full re-roof

From tired and leaking to built to last

This worn, moss-covered roof was fully stripped, re-felted and battened, then finished with fresh tiles, a clean new ridge line and crisp leadwork. The result is a watertight, great-looking roof set to protect the home for decades to come.

Recent work

A look at our roofs

A selection of recent jobs across Luton, Reading, Oxford and the surrounding area.

Meet the owner

On every roof, from quote to completion

Roof 2 Roofs Specialist is a local, hands-on roofing company built on one simple idea: do honest work, charge a fair price, and treat every roof like it is our own.

With over a decade in the trade, we have built our reputation on tidy workmanship, clear communication and roofs that stand the test of time. When you call, you deal with the people doing the work, not a call centre. From a quick repair to a full re-roof, you get the same straight-talking service every time.

A
Albert
Owner, Roof 2 Roofs Specialist Ltd
